title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BACO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BENITO VILLAR MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 528 / 50 OG No. 8, 3444 (August, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1105, June 15, 1954 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BACO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BENITO VILLAR MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Baco Elementary School in the municipality of Baco, Province of Oriental Mindoro, is changed to Benito Villar Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 15, 1954.
